title: Polystichum ascendens
intro: Polystichum ascendens, also known as the Asian sword fern or Autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Polystichum ascendens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, fever, and sore throats.
taxonomy: Polystichum ascendens is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to East Asia, specifically in China and Japan. Polystichum ascendens belongs to the genus Polystichum, which includes various species of shield ferns. This genus is further classified within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. Polystichum ascendens is a unique and distinct species within this classification.
